text:
1 / Choose your memobottle
Select from 4 convenient, travel-ready sizes.

2 / Choose your Silicone Sleeve
Add personality and protection to your new favourite water bottle.

3 / Top it off with a Coloured Lid
Twist and shout. Our Lids come with a leak-proof design, in a wide range of colours and finishes.

4 / Add a Desk Stand
Crafted from durable powder-coated steel, the Desk Stand keeps your memobottle propped up and displayed on your desk.

Fits in my work bag, backpacks, purses, with my notebooks. It's a daily reminder to drink more water. I'm so happy I don't have to think of Christmas gifts this year — everyone's getting memobottles!
